AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.title: Misfortune
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.descript:
Takes additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-MISFORTUNE_POWER.smartDes:
Takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage from [gold]Unfortunate[/gold] Attacks.
Halves at the end of the enemy turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.title: Goof
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.description: When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}, and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-GOOF_POWER.smartDescripti:
When you obtain [blue]10[/blue] or more [gold]Goof[/gold], lose [blue]10[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, and draw [blue]2[/blue] cards.
([blue]{Amount}[/blue]/[blue]10[/blue] obtained.)
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.title: Thumb War
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.descripti: Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]2[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-THUMB_WAR_POWER.remoteDes: Whenever [gold]{Applier}[/gold] or [gold]Osty[/gold] hit this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOOM_NEXT_TURN_POWER.desc: At the start of your next turn, apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-DOOM_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smar: At the start of your next turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.title: Eclipse
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.description: [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] are also played at the end of your turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-ECLIPSE_POWER.smartDescri: [gold]Haunted[/gold] cards in your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold] are also played at the end of your turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.title: Bleh
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.description: The first time each turn you draw a Status or Curse card, [gold]Transform[/gold] it into a random [gold]Treat[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLEH_POWER.smartDescripti: The first {Amount:plural:time|[blue]{}[/blue] times} each turn you draw a Status or Curse card, [gold]Transform[/gold] it into a random [gold]Treat[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.title: Bone Vigil
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.descript: Whenever a card is [gold]Buried[/gold], [gold]Osty[/gold] heals [blue]2[/blue] HP.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BONE_VIGIL_POWER.smartDes: Whenever a card is [gold]Buried[/gold], [gold]Osty[/gold] heals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLACK_CAT_POWER.title: Black Cat
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLACK_CAT_POWER.descripti: Whenever a card is created, [gold]Bury[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Haunted[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BLACK_CAT_POWER.smartDesc: #Whenever a card is created, [gold]Bury[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random [gold]Haunted[/gold] card(s) from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-JESTER_POWER.title: Jester
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-JESTER_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Goof[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] random card from another character into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold]. It gains [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-JESTER_POWER.smartDescrip: #Whenever you gain [gold]Goof[/gold], add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random card(s) from another character into your [gold]Sepulchre Pile[/gold]. {Amount:plural:It gains|They gain} [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPORK_ANTICS_POWER.title: Spork Antics
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPORK_ANTICS_POWER.descri: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPORK_ANTICS_POWER.smartD: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold] this turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SPORKS_POWER.title: Sporks
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BACK_IN_YOU_GO_POWER.desc: At the start of your turn, [gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-BACK_IN_YOU_GO_POWER.smar: #At the start of your turn, [gold]Haunt[/gold] and [gold]Bury[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random card(s) in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-RECIPROCATION_POWER.title: Reciprocation
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-RECIPROCATION_POWER.descr: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], apply [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-RECIPROCATION_POWER.smart: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOPSY_TURVY_POWER.title: Topsy Turvy
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOPSY_TURVY_POWER.descrip: At the end of your turn, [gold]Bury[/gold] up to [blue]1[/blue] card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TOPSY_TURVY_POWER.smartDe: #At the end of your turn, [gold]Bury[/gold] up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s) in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TASTY_SOUL_POWER.title: Tasty Soul
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TASTY_SOUL_POWER.descript: If this creature dies before the end of its turn, the applier gains Max HP, and the [gold]Feast[/gold] that applied this [gold]Exhausts[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TASTY_SOUL_POWER.smartDes: If [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] dies before the end of its turn, {ApplierName.StringValue:cond:[gold]{ApplierName}[/gold] gains|you gain} [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Max HP, and the [gold]{NumberOfFeasts:plural:Feast|Feasts}[/gold] that applied this [gold]{NumberOfFeasts:plural:Exhausts|Exhaust}[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEUROPURGE_POWER.title: Neuropurge
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEUROPURGE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NEUROPURGE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PRANKSTER_FORM_POWER.desc:
Whenever you play an Attack, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold].
Whenever you play a Skill, apply [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PRANKSTER_FORM_POWER.smar:
Whenever you play an Attack, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Goof[/gold].
Whenever you play a Skill, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Misfortune[/gold] to ALL enemies.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TWINSIES_POWER.title: Twinsies
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TWINSIES_POWER.descriptio: [gold]Bury[/gold] a copy of the first manually played card each turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-TWINSIES_POWER.smartDescr: [gold]Bury[/gold] a copy of the first {Amount:plural:|[blue]{} [/blue]}manually played {Amount:plural:card|cards} each turn.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-VAMPIRIC_WARD_POWER.title: Vampiric Ward
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECRO_MOCKERY_POWER.title: Necro Mockery
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECRO_MOCKERY_POWER.descr: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] loses HP, a random enemy takes that much damage [gold]Unfortunately[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-NECRO_MOCKERY_POWER.smart: Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] loses HP, a random enemy takes {Amount:plural:|[blue]{Amount}[/blue] times }that much damage [gold]Unfortunately[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERLOAD_POWER.title: Overload
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERLOAD_POWER.descriptio: Whenever a [gold]Haunted[/gold] card is [gold]Buried[/gold], it gains [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERLOAD_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever a [gold]Haunted[/gold] card is [gold]Buried[/gold], it gains [gold]Bury[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAPSTICK_POWER.title: Slapstick
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAPSTICK_POWER.descripti: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Surprise[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-SLAPSTICK_POWER.smartDesc: #At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Surprise(s)[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
